content:
# Pet

**Summary**: A common thermoplastic polymer resin of the polyester filament type.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] identified PET as the most common polymer type in the collected samples.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] PET is a major contributor to microplastic pollution due to its widespread use in packaging.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] Identified via ATR-FTIR spectroscopy.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- PET was found in fibers with transparent, blue, and red colors. ([[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022, p. 51]])
